details: The “Atma Nirbhar Matsya Palan Yojana (ANMPY)” was launched by the Department of Fisheries, Government of Arunachal Pradesh. It aims to promote self-reliant fish farming practices and enhance income generation among Scheduled Tribe (ST) beneficiaries through aquaculture activities. Under this flagship scheme, a credit-linked front-ended subsidy is provided for fisheries development to individual farmers, Self Help Groups (SHGs), and Farmers Producer Organizations (FPOs) in Arunachal Pradesh.
The scheme is implemented by the District Fisheries Development Officers (DFDOs), under the supervision of District Level Screening Committees (DLSCs).
eligibility: The applicant must be a Scheduled Tribe (ST) of Arunachal Pradesh.
The applicant must be a permanent resident of Arunachal Pradesh.
The applicant must be between 18 to 60 years of age.
The applicant must not be a bank defaulter.
The applicant must not be a government servant.
The applicant must have experience in fisheries or aquaculture.
The applicant must have sufficient and suitable land for aquaculture activity.
SHGs must be affiliated with APRSLM (Arunachal Pradesh State Rural Livelihood Mission).
SHGs under NERCOMP (for Changlang) are also eligible.
SHGs must be actively engaged in fisheries or aquaculture.
Eligibility Criteria for Farmers Producer Organizations (FPOs)
The FPO must have at least 100 shareholders.
The FPO must have at least one audited balance sheet.
Only FPOs engaged in fisheries/aquaculture are eligible.

faqs.question: Who can apply?
faqs.answer: ST individuals, SHGs affiliated to APRSLM/NERCOMP, and fisheries-related FPOs in Arunachal Pradesh.

faqs.question: What is the subsidy structure?
faqs.answer: 45% government subsidy, 45% bank loan, and 10% beneficiary contribution.

faqs.question: Is there an age limit?
faqs.answer: Yes, applicants must be between 18 to 60 years of age.

faqs.question: Can government employees apply?
faqs.answer: No, the scheme excludes government servants.

faqs.question: Is experience in fisheries mandatory?
faqs.answer: Yes, for individuals and FPOs, SHGs must be relevant to aquaculture.

faqs.question: Can SHGs outside APRSLM apply?
faqs.answer: No, SHGs must be under APRSLM (or NERCOMP for Changlang).

faqs.question: Are all applicants selected?
faqs.answer: No, selection is based on DLSC screening and fund availability.

faqs.question: Who to contact for queries?
faqs.answer: Visit or contact your district's DFDO office during office hours.

faqs.question: What is required for FPO eligibility?
faqs.answer: Registration, 100+ shareholders, and an audited balance sheet.

faqs.question: Is the benefit recurring?
faqs.answer: No, it is a one-time subsidy per financial year.
